strings.uploadDescription: Please select CSV file containing local unit data, make sure the file is in the correct format.
strings.selectLocalUnitTypeDescription: Please select local unit to upload the CSV file
strings.bulkUploadFormatDescription: If you want to look at the format template, see here.
strings.bulkUploadConfirmMessage: Are you sure you want to bulk upload the Local Unit?
strings.bulkUploadSuccessMessage: {type} Local Units data for {country} uploaded and updated successfully.
strings.bulkUploadFailedMessage: Failed to upload {type} Local Units data for {country} due to errors. Please review the details in the errors.csv file
strings.noPermissionBothDescription: You don't have permission and this unit is not externally managed.
strings.noPermissionErrorDescription: You do not have the permission to upload local unit data
strings.noPermissionExternallyManaged: You do not have the permission to upload local unit data it is not externally managed
